title: TikTok art download no watermark free
tldr: Learn how to download TikTok art videos without a watermark for free using Saveik. This guide covers step-by-step instructions for iPhone, Android, and PC, plus tips for extracting MP3 audio.
description: Download TikTok art videos without watermark for free. Step-by-step guide for iPhone, Android, and PC using Saveik. Includes MP3 audio extraction tips.
author: Saveik Team
keywords: tiktok art download no watermark free
content:
## Introduction

TikTok has become a vibrant canvas for artists, from digital painters and sketchers to animators and crafters. Whether you're an aspiring creator looking for inspiration or a collector wanting to save a masterpiece, downloading art videos from TikTok allows you to build a personal gallery. However, TikTok's native download feature often adds a watermark, which can distract from the artwork's purity. That's why many users seek a way to download TikTok art without watermark for free. Saveik.com offers a simple, browser-based solution that preserves the original quality of the video, letting you enjoy and share art without any branding.

## How to Download TikTok Art Without Watermark

Using Saveik, you can save any TikTok art video in just three steps. No app installation or account creation is required.

### Step 1: Copy the TikTok Video Link
Open the TikTok app or website and find the art video you want to download. Tap the "Share" icon (an arrow) and select "Copy Link" from the menu. The link will be copied to your clipboard.

### Step 2: Paste the Link into Saveik
Go to saveik.com on your preferred browser. You'll see a text box labeled "Paste TikTok URL here." Tap or click inside the box and paste the copied link. Then, click the "Download" button.

### Step 3: Choose Your Format and Download
Saveik will process the video and present you with options. You can download the video as an MP4 file without watermark, or choose to extract the audio as MP3. Select your preferred format and click the download button. The file will save directly to your device.

## Device-Specific Instructions

### iPhone/iPad
On iOS devices, use Safari or any browser to access saveik.com. After pasting the link and clicking download, the video will appear in your Downloads folder or prompt you to save to Photos. If you want to save directly to your camera roll, enable "Save to Photos" in your browser settings or use the share option after download.

### Android
Android users can use Chrome or any browser. After downloading, the file will be stored in your device's "Downloads" folder. You can then move it to your gallery using a file manager. Some browsers may ask for permission to save files; grant it to proceed.

### PC (Windows/Mac)
On a computer, simply visit saveik.com, paste the link, and download the video. The file will be saved to your default downloads folder. You can then organize it into a dedicated folder for TikTok art.

## Tips for Downloading MP3 Audio

If you want to save just the audio from a TikTok art video—perhaps for a background track or a sound effect—Saveik allows you to download the audio as an MP3 file. This is especially useful for art tutorials where the creator explains techniques verbally. After pasting the link, choose the "MP3" option instead of MP4. The audio will be extracted in high quality, free from any watermark or visual elements.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can I download TikTok art videos without watermark on any device?
Yes, Saveik works on any device with a web browser, including iPhone, Android, tablets, and computers. The process is identical across platforms.

### Is it legal to download TikTok art videos?
Downloading videos for personal use, such as inspiration or offline viewing, is generally acceptable. However, redistributing or claiming ownership of someone else's art without permission may violate copyright. Always credit the original creator when sharing.

### Does Saveik store my downloaded videos?
No, Saveik processes videos in real-time and does not store any files on its servers. Once you download, the video is only on your device, ensuring your privacy.

## Conclusion

Downloading TikTok art without a watermark has never been easier, thanks to Saveik. Whether you're an artist curating a portfolio or a fan saving your favorite pieces, this free tool provides a seamless experience across all devices. Visit saveik.com today to start building your collection of stunning, watermark-free art videos.
